creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
netscape45-communicator was marked as BROKEN (PLIST); I've fixed the
PLIST and introduced some changes:
   * fixed blanks (TAB instead white spaces) in Makefile
   * Fixed PLIST handling (PLIST_SUB & NO_FILTER_SHLIBS)
   * Broken NDIR into ${PREFIX}/${NDIRBASE}; and while we're at it: why do
     we use a ${PREFIX}/lib/netscape instead ${PREFIX}/netscape ? Even
     ns-install has /usr/local/netscape as default...
   * Removed the MULTIVERSION bits (I bet everyone will use both 4.07/4.08
     & 4.5 for some time, and besides, this will make the port
     "compatible" with netscape4-communicator)
   * I used the post-configure target to fix the netscape.sh script (in
     order to make use of ${NDIR}) instead of scripts/configure...
   * Added a SIZE( ) line to files/md5 (in expectation of SIZE checking in
     the fetch target)
   * Fixed files/netscape.sh to use ${NDIR}
   * Fixed a bit pkg/COMMENT & pkg/DESCR to something more reasonable (I
     hope)
   * Fixed PLIST (including using %%NDIRBASE%%, reactivating @(un)exec
     (un)linking )

 There are still some bits left to fix, mainly to correctly generate a
package (fixing netscape.sh at package install time, generating vreg
information at pkg-install time, etc.).

Fix: I've attached the archived patchfile. Please review & commit.

 Thanks,
 Adrian Penisoara
 Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)

--8<--
